hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into one operational workflow to help VASP compliance teams monitor alerts, manage cases, and preserve audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when providers remain disconnected
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams face fragmented workflows as KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening outputs remain siloed across multiple systems. This creates manual handoffs, inconsistent risk visibility, weak audit trails, and delays in monitoring alerts through a unified control layer.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening data into one unified workflow, enabling compliance teams to track alerts, manage cases and preserve audit evidence through a single control layer.
workflow_title: From provider alerts to case resolution
workflow_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider alerts into structured cases with routing, review, decision logging and evidence to support timely compliance resolution.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented tools. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY unifies fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and evidence, enabling VASPs to maintain clearer operational control and audit-ready compliance records.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing ongoing alert monitoring, provider orchestration and audit evidence within a secure, enterprise-grade deployment framework.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY connect compliance alerts and workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance cases consolidate provider alerts

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY is a compliance control layer for digital asset businesses that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, regulatory updates, cases, evidence and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY collects outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into a connected workflow, enabling structured reviews, case creation, decision logging and alert monitoring within one platform.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to maintain audit-ready records that support regulatory review and internal compliance traceability.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing providers and compliance tools, adding a controlled orchestration layer without requiring replacement of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs, turning fragmented data into structured compliance workflows and audit evidence.
final_title: Turn provider outputs into connected compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects alerts, cases, rules and evidence into one controlled compliance layer for VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
